blended.narrative: Sundown Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light rain showers, highs of 47°F.

Sunday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
